title: Draft: package DominationV2 cache candidate handoff
author: shouryamaanjain

data.description: Entropy-gated adaptive bigram cache used during evaluation after quantized roundtrip and optional TTT

novel_contributions: Packages the current best candidate as a clean handoff under /final
Adds an evaluation-only change: flat sliding-window scoring with a BOS-reset entropy-gated adaptive bigram cache
Adds scripts for training, 8xH100 launching, and checkpoint evaluation through the research evaluator
Adds research-side evaluator and verifier for cache experiments, parity checks, multi-rank aggregation, and TTT-loop equivalence
Fixes evaluator correctness issues including sliding-window schedule parity and non-overlapping multi-rank document sharding
Demonstrates that the cache still improves bpb after TTT on a strong 1xH100 proxy checkpoint
